QF.id: I Clearing Settlement and Risk Management_29

question.text: The position limit linked to open interest is applicable:

answer.text: At the time of opening a position (not retroactively if OI decreases)
Only at the time of contract expiry

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Position limits linked to OI are checked when OPENING new positions. If a member's existing position exceeds the limit due to OI decrease (not new positions), they're not forced to reduce but can't add more. **The Trap:** You won't be forced to close existing positions if OI drops — the limit applies only to NEW position creation. **Cross-Exam Context:** OI-linked position limit rules are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This means during low OI periods, position limits become tighter for new positions.
